summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin SaaS Module. All 24 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified working including login, dashboard KPIs, hotels CRUD, search/filter, logs page.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with superadmin@flowtym.com / super123 returns token with role=super_admin (200)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/dashboard returns stats with MRR/ARR/plan_distribution/growth_data (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/dashboard requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/plans returns 4 subscription plans (basic/pro/premium/enterprise) (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels returns hotels list with subscription info (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels creates new hotel (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels/{id} returns hotel details (200)
Backend: PATCH /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/status?status=suspended suspends hotel (200)
Backend: PATCH /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/status?status=active activates hotel (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/superadmin/hotels/{id} soft deletes hotel (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels?search=Grand filters by search (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels?status=active filters by status (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/subscriptions creates subscription with free_15_days trial (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/subscriptions creates subscription with half_price_first_month trial (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/subscriptions/{hotel_id} returns active subscription (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/sepa-mandates creates SEPA mandate with masked IBAN (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/sepa-mandates/{hotel_id} returns mandates list (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/contract/pdf returns PDF file (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/sepa-mandate/pdf returns PDF file (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/logs returns activity logs (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/logs?entity_type=hotel filters logs (200)
Backend: Regular user cannot access superadmin endpoints (403)
Backend: Unauthenticated requests rejected (401/403)
Frontend: /superadmin route loads login page correctly
Frontend: Login page has email/password inputs and submit button
Frontend: Login with superadmin@flowtym.com / super123 succeeds
Frontend: Dashboard displays 4 KPI cards (Hôtels Total, MRR, Utilisateurs, Expiration)
Frontend: Dashboard shows plan distribution chart (Basic, Pro, Premium, Enterprise)
Frontend: Dashboard shows growth chart (6 months)
Frontend: Dashboard shows recent activity log
Frontend: Hotels page lists all hotels with status badges
Frontend: Hotels page has search input and status filter dropdown
Frontend: 'Ajouter un hôtel' button opens hotel creation form
Frontend: Hotel creation form has all required fields (name, legal_name, siret, address, city, postal_code, contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone)
Frontend: Hotels table has columns: Hôtel, Plan, Utilisateurs, Statut, Fin abonnement
Frontend: Each hotel row has View, Download, Suspend/Activate buttons
Frontend: Search filter works correctly
Frontend: Status filter works correctly
Frontend: Logs page shows activity history with Date, Action, Entité, Par columns
Frontend: Sidebar navigation works (Dashboard, Hôtels, Abonnements, Utilisateurs, Facturation, Logs)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up multiple TEST_ prefixed hotels during testing. Grand Hotel Paris (691777ca-2ad0-4412-87f2-3f3fbb3ae1d0) remains as seed data with Pro subscription.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin module fully tested. All APIs working: dashboard KPIs (MRR/ARR), hotels CRUD, subscriptions with trial options (free_15_days, half_price_first_month), SEPA mandates, PDF generation (contract + SEPA), activity logs. Frontend login at /superadmin uses separate token storage (sa_token in localStorage). All 4 subscription plans available: basic ($99/mo), pro ($199/mo), premium ($349/mo), enterprise ($599/mo). PDF generation uses reportlab library.

hotels_management.list: Table with search and status filter

super_admin_module.activity_logs: Full audit trail of all admin actions
